name: updateDashboardChart
description: Patch a single chart in an existing dashboard by chart ID. Provide only the chart fields to change. Set a field to null to remove it. Use overwrite=true to skip version conflict checks, or provide the current dashboard version for optimistic concurrency control.

dashboardUid.description: The dashboard UID (stable external identifier). You can find UIDs using the `listDashboards()` tool.

chartId.description: The chart ID inside the dashboard charts array.

chartPatchJson.description: A JSON merge-patch object for a single dashboard chart. Include only fields to change; set a field to null to remove it. If id is present, it must match chartId.

overwrite.description: When true (default), bypasses version checks and applies last-write-wins. When false, the version parameter is required.

version.description: The current dashboard version number. Required when overwrite is false. Get this from exportDashboard().

message.description: Optional audit/change note for this operation.
